content.query:
create database retailpoc

USE retailpoc

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE blob_retail_datasource
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'https://retial1.blob.core.windows.net/retailproject'
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT ParquetFormat
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE =  PARQUET
)

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE df_revenue (
    event_date DATE,
    daily_revenue FLOAT,
    total_purchases INT
)

WITH (
    LOCATION = '/gold/revenue/',
    DATA_SOURCE = blob_retail_datasource,
    FILE_FORMAT = ParquetFormat
);


SELECT * from df_revenue;
